pi_items.source: Web search and industry standards research confirm vendor tiering is standard practice; Tier 1 refers to business-critical vendors requiring comprehensive assessment. Task creates this through Eramba UI.
Industry standards for vendor assessments confirm security controls are a standard assessment category. Eramba supports chapter-based questionnaire organization confirmed via official documentation.
Multiple authoritative sources (UpGuard, AuditBoard, ISMS.online) confirm ISO 27001 certification is a standard yes/no question in vendor security assessment questionnaires.

Industry vendor assessment best practices and Eramba documentation confirm Yes/No as a standard question type for yes/no questions. Eramba supports multiple choice, yes/no, text, date, and attachment question types.

Multiple authoritative sources (CSA, UpGuard, Safe Security) confirm data encryption is a standard topic in vendor security assessment questionnaires. Industry frameworks like VSA and SIG include encryption standards questions.
Industry best practices indicate text/open-ended questions are appropriate for vendors to describe their encryption standards. Eramba supports text/long text question types.

Multiple authoritative sources (Copla, BitSight, AuditBoard) confirm security policy evidence is standard in vendor assessments. Industry guidance emphasizes requesting evidence of compliance rather than attestations.

Eramba feature discussion confirms 'Attachment Question Type on Online Assessments' exists. Industry best practices recommend attachment/file upload for evidence submissions (SOC 2 reports, ISO 27001 certificates, etc.).

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified as accurate and realistic. The questionnaire title 'Vendor Security Assessment - Tier 1' aligns with standard vendor tiering frameworks where Tier 1 represents business-critical vendors requiring comprehensive assessment. The chapter 'General Security Controls' is an appropriate security assessment category. All three questions (ISO 27001 Certification as Yes/No, Data Encryption Standards as Text, and Security Policy Evidence as Attachment) match industry-standard vendor security assessment practices confirmed by authoritative sources including UpGuard, AuditBoard, ISO 27001 guidance, and CSA standards. Question types align with Eramba's supported questionnaire functionality.
